text_direction=”default”]

See The Sea, City & Gardens

Experience a scenic excursion to see the sights and colours of Victoria. The Victoria City + Garden Tour Package includes; Round-trip Flights, Island Time Tours Victoria City & Butchart Gardens Tour including entry to the Gardens

[/vc_column_text][divider line_type=”No Line” custom_height=”40″][vc_row_inner column_margin=”default” column_direction=”default” column_direction_tablet=”default” column_direction_phone=”default” text_align=”left” row_position=”default” row_position_tablet=”inherit” row_position_phone=”inherit” overflow=”visible” pointer_events=”all”][vc_column_inner column_padding=”no-extra-padding” column_border_width=”none” column_border_style=”solid”][vc_column_text css=”” text_direction=”default”]Departing downtown Vancouver, experience the amazing scenic beauty of the Salish Sea, The Gulf and San Juan Islands on the 35 minute flight from Vancouver to Victoria Harbour.

Upon arrival, Island Time Tours will pick up from the Helijet terminal to join in one of its 60 minute scenic tours exploring of the sights of Victoria before making your way through the Saanich Peninsula to at the world famous Butchart Gardens.  Spend time exploring the lush landscapes before returning to the city.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner column_margin=”default” column_direction=”default” column_direction_tablet=”default” column_direction_phone=”default” text_align=”left” row_position=”default” row_position_tablet=”inherit” animation_type=”default” bg_image_animation=”none” border_type=”simple” column_border_width=”none” column_border_style=”solid”][vc_column_text css=”” text_direction=”default”]Highlights include

• Spectacular views of The Salish Sea, Greater Victoria and the Saanich Peninsula from air and ground
• Island Times Group Tour of Victoria and Scenic Excursion to Butchart Gardens
• Time to explore the renowned National Historic Site, The Butchart Gardens[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner column_margin=”default” column_direction=”default” column_direction_tablet=”default” column_direction_phone=”default” text_align=”left” row_position=”default” row_position_tablet=”inherit” row_position_phone=”inherit” overflow=”visible” pointer_events=”all”][vc_column_inner column_padding=”no-extra-padding” column_padding_tablet=”inherit” column_padding_phone=”inherit” column_padding_position=”all” flex_gap_desktop=”10px” column_element_direction_desktop=”default” column_element_spacing=”default” desktop_text_alignment=”default” tablet_text_alignment=”default” phone_text_alignment=”default” background_color_opacity=”1″ background_hover_color_opacity=”1″ column_backdrop_filter=”none” column_shadow=”none” column_border_radius=”none” column_link_target=”_self” overflow=”visible” gradient_direction=”left_to_right” overlay_strength=”0.3″ width=”1/1″ tablet_width_inherit=”default” animation_type=”default” bg_image_animation=”none” border_type=”simple” column_border_width=”none” column_border_style=”solid”][vc_column_text css=”” text_direction=”default”]At the end of your adventure, Island Time Tours may drop off back at Victoria Harbour Heliport for your return flight, with its one of a kind view of the North Shore Mountains while passing Point Grey and over Lions Gate Bridge into Vancouver Harbour.

From April 1-25 2026
Flight times subject to change:
Depart at 8:45am weekdays / 8am weekends from Vancouver Harbour Heliport
Matching up with a 10am Island Time Tour’s Victoria City Tour & Butchart Gardens Combo
Return at 4pm weekdays / 3:55pm weekends from Victoria Harbour Heliport

Excursion, as suggested = approximately 7 hour duration including 70 minutes flight time + 5 hour Island Time Tour with 2.5 hours at Butchart Gardens.
Based on availability, Tuesday to Sunday (closed Mondays) other flight times may be available, if guests would like to stay and explore Victoria.
Flight check-in is a minimum of  20 minutes prior to departure, Photo ID is required 

FARES*: inclusive of roundtrip flight, tour, taxes and fees
$695.60 / Adult 18+
$660.32 / Youth 13-17 years
$376.40/ Child 5 to 12 years accompanied by an adult
*fares valid April 1 to May 15, 2026 
As space is limited, excursion bookings are suggested at least 48 hours in advance
Cancellations may be made up to 24 hours in advance, non-refundable within 24 hours.
Ask for Group Booking fees and cancellations
All passengers must be able to interdependently wear a vehicle seatbelt; booster, car seats and strollers can not be carried on tour vehicle.

Email excursions[at]helijet.to.com for more information
Call Helijet Reservations, 1.800.665.4354, to book your City + Gardens Excursion[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][vc_column column_padding=”no-extra-padding” column_padding_tablet=”inherit” column_padding_phone=”inherit” column_padding_position=”all” flex_gap_desktop=”10px” column_element_direction_desktop=”default” column_element_spacing=”default” desktop_text_alignment=”default” tablet_text_alignment=”default” phone_text_alignment=”default” background_color_opacity=”1″ background_hover_color_opacity=”1″ column_backdrop_filter=”none” column_shadow=”none” column_border_radius=”none” column_link_target=”_self” column_position=”default” gradient_direction=”left_to_right” overlay_strength=”0.3″ width=”1/6″ tablet_width_inherit=”default” animation_type=”default” bg_image_animation=”none” border_type=”simple” column_border_width=”none” column_border_style=”solid”][/vc_column][/vc_row]
